_doc: Commercial-release accuracy thresholds. Updated 2026-05-27. Each metric has 'min' (hard fail) and 'target' (warn if below).

key_exact_acc.source: synth 12-note key set (known GT). NOTE: no worship audio on disk — real-song key accuracy unmeasured

bpm_within_4pct_acc.source: synth click track (known BPM). NOTE: no real-song BPM accuracy measured

bpm_band_plausible_rate.source: fraction of songs whose detected BPM lands in the 50-180 plausibility band — a sanity check, NOT 8% accuracy. Real 8% accuracy needs external BPM GT (sparse): see external_bpm_8pct_mean in real_accuracy_v4 reports

root_accuracy_synth.source: synth progression. measured 0.80 (2026-05-27); triads 6/6, 7ths weak w/o CREMA

_vocab_ceiling_note.source: CREMA model vocab = 14 qualities (maj/min/aug/dim/7/maj7/min7/dim7/hdim7/minmaj7/maj6/min6/sus2/sus4). A chroma-energy post-processor (chord_tension.py) now ADDS add9/6/sus and 9/11/13 and altered (7b9/7#9/7#11/7#5/maj7#11) on top — verified on SYNTHETIC chords (18/18) only. First real-audio evidence 2026-05-27 (worship slice: add9/m7 fired plausibly), but real-music EXTENSION/ALTERED accuracy is still UNMEASURED (no labeled corpus). Altered spelling is heuristic; user-editable in lead-sheet.

correction_improved_rate.source: synth detuned tones, natural preset. measured 0.875 (2026-05-27)

mean_residual_cents.source: residual vs nearest scale tone. measured 21.1 (2026-05-27)

boundary_hit_rate_3s.source: synth clear-structure song, ±3s. measured 0.75 (2026-05-27); short intros absorbed

drum_f1.source: heuristic + polyphonic hat emission. measured 0.886 (2026-05-27, was 0.781 before polyphonic)

leave_one_out_overall.source: 5178-vector reference DB, top-16 cosine vote. measured 0.983 (2026-05-27)

well_populated_category_min.source: min accuracy across categories with >=40 refs. measured 0.967 (2026-05-27)
